input:
Repurpose this LinkedIn post into a Twitter/X thread:

'Most founders I talk to are still writing every email, caption, and proposal by hand.

I was too — until I built an AI assistant that handles the first draft of everything.

Here's what changed:
→ Client proposals: 4 hours → 20 minutes
→ Email replies: 30 min/day → 5 min
→ Instagram captions: 45 min → 8 min

The tool doesn't replace my voice. It removes the blank page.

If you're a founder spending more than 2 hours/week on writing tasks, you're leaving leverage on the table.

DM me "AI" and I'll show you the setup.'
criteria: tweet 1 is the hook — captures the most compelling idea in under 280 characters
tweet 1 does NOT start with 'I' or simply copy the LinkedIn opener verbatim
the specific time savings (4h→20min, etc.) are preserved
final tweet includes the DM CTA
thread has 5-10 tweets total — not too short, not padded
judge_prompt: You are evaluating a content repurposing task by an AI marketing assistant. Score 0-10. Full marks: numbered thread 5-10 tweets, tweet 1 is a new hook (not copied from LinkedIn), time savings data preserved, each tweet under 280 chars, DM CTA in final tweet. Deduct 3 if tweet 1 copies the LinkedIn opener. Deduct 2 if any tweet exceeds 280 characters. Deduct 2 if thread is under 5 tweets.
